import io
import list
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  mut lines: List<String> = []
  mut running = true
  while running
    match io.read_line()
    when Some(line)
      lines = list.push(lines, line)
    when None
      running = false
    end
  end

  let n = lines.len()
  mut count = n
  if n > 0
    match lines.get(n - 1)
    when Some(last)
      if string.is_empty(last)
        count = n - 1
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
  end

  mut i = 0
  while i < count
    match lines.get(i)
    when Some(line)
      print("[#{i}] #{line}")
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
end
